# Arun Kushwaha - Full-Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer

Arun Kushwaha is a Software Developer specializing in building scalable backend systems, low-latency architectures, and production-grade cloud services. He is a final-year B.Tech student at NIT Hamirpur.

## Core Information
- **Domain:** [arunkushwaha.xyz](https://arunkushwaha.xyz)
- **Role:** Full-Stack Developer / DevOps / AI Systems
- **Location:** Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh, India
- **Contact:** arunsk1310@gmail.com | +91-9555547363

## Technical Arsenal
- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, C++, SQL, Golang, Java, Bash
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express, FastAPI, REST, GraphQL, WebSockets, Socket.IO
- **Data & Infra:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Cloud SQL, GCS
- **Cloud & DevOps:** GCP (Cloud Run, Document AI), AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- **Frontend:** React, Vite, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- **Core Concepts:** System Design, Performance Testing, Observability, RBAC, Microservices

## Key Projects
### Enterprise PDF to CSV Pipeline
- High-throughput document processing pipeline using GCP Document AI.
- Processes 5,000+ documents per batch with dynamic worker scaling (2→75 workers).
- Optimized database performance with bulk transactional operations.

### CollabNest - Real-Time Collaboration
- Multi-tenant real-time task platform with RBAC and optimistic UI.
- Sustained high load (100+ req/s) with 0% error rate and WebSocket stability.
- Reduced DB reads by 60% via Redis caching.

### AI FIR Analysis & Legal-Act Prediction
- Retrieval-augmented LLM pipeline (RAG) for legal documents.
- Ranked Top 10 at Rajasthan Police Hackathon 2024.

### Resume Roaster
- ATS optimization platform using LLMs for semantic parsing.
- FastAPI backend with 95%+ accuracy.

## Experience
- **Software Developer Intern at CreditMitra:** Building fintech modules and third-party API integrations.
- **Freelance Software Engineer (PDF Data Extraction):** Built production document pipelines with GCP.
- **President at SPEC Society, NIT Hamirpur:** Led technical events and standardized dev processes.
